response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the search matches, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Alphabetize named results and omit only entries explicitly reported unavailable.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call facilities_search, facilities_availability, and facilities_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the facilities desk handoff, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: search Building A for "Lobby Door Inspection"; check whether "Lobby Door Inspection" is available on 2026-08-22 in Building A; and list active requests in Building A. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Alphabetize named results in the final summary and omit only entries the tools explicitly report as unavailable.
